title: Transport farm produce or bulk materials
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Transport farm produce or bulk materials demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Organise for the transport of farm produce

pcs.text: Receive, interpret and clarify briefing, hand-over details, authorisation and clearances
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Receive, interpret and clarify briefing, hand-over details, authorisation and clearances?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Receive, interpret and clarify briefing, hand-over details, authorisation and clearances.

pcs.text: Confirm the transportation schedule and organise equipment and personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm the transportation schedule and organise equipment and personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm the transportation schedule and organise equipment and personnel.

pcs.text: Adhere to transport schedule and regulatory requirements relevant to farm produce being transported

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Adhere to transport schedule and regulatory requirements relevant to farm produce being transported.

pcs.text: Identify hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task.

pcs.text: Conduct truck and equipment routine pre-operational checks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct truck and equipment routine pre-operational checks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct truck and equipment routine pre-operational checks.

pcs.text: Identify site environmental and biosecurity implications associated with transport of farm produce and undertake activities to minimise impact
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify site environmental and biosecurity implications associated with transport of farm produce and undertake activities to minimise impact?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify site environmental and biosecurity implications associated with transport of farm produce and undertake activities to minimise impact.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out pre-start, start-up, park and shutdown procedures for truck and equipment.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow approved transport routes and speed limits.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Unload farm produce or bulk materials.
